{"result":"Day advanced to 2026-02-10.
11,667 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.
181 question(s) are still active. Re-read market.csv, scan today's news, and resubmit any forecast where new evidence has shifted your view before calling next_day again. A forecast is never "done" while its question is still active.
